description: Fix list_stars tool swallowing auth and rate-limit errors when trying the enterprise saved.list endpoint.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/slack-enterprise && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Only catch non-auth/non-rate-limit errors in saved.list fallback
userStories.description: The catch block for the saved.list enterprise API call catches ALL errors including auth and rate-limit errors. It should only catch errors indicating the endpoint doesn't exist.
acceptanceCriteria: Auth errors (ToolError with category 'auth') are re-thrown, not caught
Rate-limit errors (ToolError with category 'rate_limit') are re-thrown, not caught
Other errors (404, method not found) still fall through to the stars.list fallback
